title: Number of Ways to Reorder Array to Get Same BST
titleCn: 将子数组重新排序得到同一个二叉搜索树的方案数

testcases.input: nums = [2,1,3] Output: 1 Explanation: We can reorder nums to be [2,3,1] which will yield the same BST. There are no other ways to reorder nums which will yield the same BST.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: We can reorder nums to be [2,3,1] which will yield the same BST. There are no other ways to reorder nums which will yield the same BST.

testcases.input: nums = [3,4,5,1,2] Output: 5 Explanation: The following 5 arrays will yield the same BST: [3,1,2,4,5] [3,1,4,2,5] [3,1,4,5,2] [3,4,1,2,5] [3,4,1,5,2]
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The following 5 arrays will yield the same BST: [3,1,2,4,5] [3,1,4,2,5] [3,1,4,5,2] [3,4,1,2,5] [3,4,1,5,2]

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3] Output: 0 Explanation: There are no other orderings of nums that will yield the same BST.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There are no other orderings of nums that will yield the same BST.
